title: Software Update - Headset and all components have update available - UI
scenario: Software Update UI fails to display individual firmware info and Update buttons for headset components with available updates
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
3. Tap on the Software Update tab within Device Settings.
4. Observe the displayed firmware information for the headset and all its components (e.g., headset, charge stand, earbuds, charge case).

5. For each component that supports DFU via mobile, verify that the current firmware version is shown, the latest available firmware version is displayed as a link to release notes, and an Update button is present.
6. For headsets with a charge stand or earbuds with a charge case, verify that an 'Update All' button is shown in addition to individual firmware info and Update buttons for each component.
7. For any component that does not support DFU via mobile, verify that a note is displayed directing the user to update via the PC app instead of showing an Update button.
expected: The Software Update tab shows current firmware version, latest firmware version as a link to release notes, and an Update button for each component that supports DFU via mobile. For multi-component devices (headset + charge stand or earbuds + charge case), an 'Update All' button is shown alongside individual component info and Update buttons. Components that do not support DFU via mobile display a note directing the user to update via the PC app.
